action.reasoning: Observation: Best Z500 RMSE = 460.9 (iter 8, base_ch=128, TTA=4). Iter 9 with base_ch=96+SWA got 483.2 (worse). Models overfit quickly (peak at epoch 5-7). Analysis: Single model is capped by overfitting. Ensemble of multiple models with different seeds is the most reliable way to improve. Adding EMA (exponential moving average) weights should also help generalization. Decision: Train 3 models with base_ch=128 (proven best size), different seeds, EMA, and ensemble their predictions with 8-shift TTA. This should reduce variance significantly.
